fomod.Name: BetaDeps - Bannerlord Beta Dependencies
fomod.Author: Trashpanda62 / Maxfield Management Group
fomod.Description:
Drop-in replacement for the four BUTR foundation mods (Bannerlord.Harmony, Bannerlord.UIExtenderEx, Bannerlord.ButterLib, Bannerlord.MBOptionScreen). Keeps community mods working through TaleWorlds beta updates by impersonating the upstream API surface from a single clean-room module.
IMPORTANT: Before installing, DISABLE these four mods in your Vortex mod list (do not uninstall - just toggle them off): - Bannerlord.Harmony - Bannerlord.UIExtenderEx - Bannerlord.ButterLib - Bannerlord.MBOptionScreen
BetaDeps replaces all four. If left enabled they'll fight for the AppDomain slot and roughly half your mod list will silently fail.
When Vortex prompts about conflicts on Bannerlord.Harmony / 0Harmony.dll, let BetaDeps win every override.
